name: Sweet Pepper Tuna Steaks
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup barbecue sauce from Barbecued Chicken recipe
4 tuna steaks, 6 to 8 ounces, about 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the barbecue sauce and lemon juice.
2. Marinate the tuna in this mixture for 20 minutes.
3. Grill or broil the tuna over a hot fire until browned and firm, about 5 minutes per side, basting with sauce every 2 minutes.
4. Remove the tuna to a platter and dollop each piece with 2 teaspoons of tomato butter.
Makes 4 servings.
